item.title: Parents of 764 victim file wrongful death lawsuit against Discord
item.description: The parents of a teen who was allegedly pushed to take his own life by a member of the online extremist network “764” have filed a wrongful death laws...

item.title: Supreme Court invalidates most of Trump's tariffs
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday invalidated most of President Donald Trump's tariffs, a cornerstone of his economic policy in his second term.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: WATCH: Couple recreates curling event inside their home
item.description: An Arkansas couple used mops and a Roomba vacuum cleaner to bring their love of curling inside their own home and go for the gold.

item.title: Poland withdraws from treaty banning antipersonnel mines
item.description: Poland has officially left the Ottawa Convention, which bans the use of antipersonnel mines
